response.justification: The candidate has strong software engineering experience and familiarity with geospatial tools (GISCollective), but lacks direct experience with routing data pipelines, C++ as a primary language, or distributed systems at scale. Their background leans heavily toward web/mobile development, open-source GIS, and high-level languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang), which does not align closely with the job's core technical requirements in modern C++ and distributed routing systems.
strengths: Proven expertise in geospatial data processing (GISCollective platform)
Strong background in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Demonstrated ability to work across full tech stacks (web, mobile, embedded)
concerns: No direct experience with modern C++ or Rust as primary languages for routing systems
Limited exposure to distributed systems concepts at scale (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Lack of experience with navigation guidance solutions or routing pipeline optimization
